title: Andrej Karpathy
body: Andrej Karpathy (born 23 October 1986) is a Slovak-Canadian AI researcher, who co-founded and formerly worked at OpenAI, where he specialized in deep learning and computer vision. He served as the director of artificial intelligence and Autopilot Vision at Tesla. In 2024 he founded Eureka Labs, an AI education platform.
